_README: WP-Flux license file. Host this on a GitHub repo's raw URL (e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/USERNAME/REPO/main/licenses.json) and paste that URL into the plugin's License tab. Edit the licenses array below to grant/revoke licenses. Set active:false or expires to a past date to instantly disable a license. Set global_kill:true at the top level to disable every license worldwide.

licenses.note: Demo license — replace with your own
